name: notes-site
description: Personal notes site with optional Android shell via Capacitor.

scripts.cap:copy: npm run prepare:web && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && GRADLE_USER_HOME=/Users/shifusong/notes-site/.gradle-home ./gradlew assembleDebug
